name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Ghost has found a new passion: eavesdropping on other people's conversations. And it seems that he is interested in your opinion.

Long SFW first message: 1086 tokens

This is supposed to be Fempov, and that you're about 24 years old. But there are no strict prohibitions.

Disclaimer, what AI says. I have no control over the bot's responses.

Have a good time!
